creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
> New Vorbis snapshot.
> Libao is a portable sound library, used by some vorbis tools.

Hi, Theo.  I see that your new ports are in conflict with the old one
(audio/vorbis).  What do you want to happen to audio/vorbis?  Some
ideas:
	- make it into a meta-port that installs all of the new ports
	- remove it
	- add notes about the conflicts
	- mark it FORBIDDEN until you decide
-- 
Trevor Johnson
http://jpj.net/~trevor/gpgkey.txt
